name: autoportfolio
description: AI-driven portfolio research skill for Claude Code. Growth + Dividend Barbell strategy with tax-aware UCITS selection.
author: Sebastian Grebe

plugins.name: autoportfolio
plugins.description: Analyze stocks with a Growth + Dividend Barbell strategy. Fetches live technicals via yfinance, applies tax-aware UCITS ETF selection for non-US residents, and commits approved picks to local CSV watchlists with Human-in-the-Loop approval.
